patient.instructions:

Volunteer: worsening shortness of breath, dry nonproductive cough, feverish/chills, chest tightness with deep breaths, severe fatigue, and that a recent chest scan showed a “nodular pattern.” Ask if you can get the cheapest tests and avoid admission/ICU; worry about missing work and ask when you can return.

Express misconceptions: suspect blood clot (right calf sore), heart failure (ankle swelling), arthritis (morning stiffness), or “just pneumonia needing antibiotics.” If clinician shows empathy, you relax slightly and share more.
